projectDescription: 100 curated AI/ML/Security interview questions with comprehensive answers and real-world applications
keyFeatures: 100 high-frequency interview problems with detailed solutions
17 categorized problem types (Arrays, Trees, DP, Graphs, etc.)
Comprehensive Python implementations with complexity analysis
Real-world and cybersecurity applications for each problem
Study plans and interview preparation strategies
Interactive HTML visualization with 3D graph view
publicApiSurface: Array-Hashing: Two Sum, Subarray Sum Equals K, Range Sum Query
Dynamic-Programming: Best Time to Buy/Sell Stock, Word Break, Maximum Subarray
Tree: Binary Tree Vertical Order, Diameter, Right Side View, LCA
Graph-DFS-BFS: Clone Graph, Course Schedule, Shortest Path
Binary-Search: Find Peak Element, Kth Missing Positive, Binary Search
Stack: Valid Parentheses, Basic Calculator II, Minimum Remove
Linked-List: Merge k Sorted Lists, Add Two Numbers, Copy with Random Pointer
Design: LRU Cache, Moving Average, BST Iterator
Heap-Priority-Queue: Kth Largest Element, Top K Frequent, Find Median
Sliding-Window: Longest Substring, Max Consecutive Ones, Minimum Window
